creator: stephen@math.missouri.edu
text:
This patch means that you can do:

cd /usr/ports/math/octave-forge
make check-all-octave-forge-depends

and it will tell you which octave-forge dependencies are incorrect. 
(You need to follow it with a 'make clean'.)

This is important, because the updates in octave-forge source code quite 
often change the dependencies.  (That is why I missed the data-smoothing 
dependency, which by the way, is the only incorrect dependency.)
